The '''Vorzyd Cluster''' was in located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It contained eleven systems, including the [[Vorzyd system/Legends|Vorzyd system]], [[Hraki]], [[Paigu]], [[Kilmaulsias]] and [[Seftek]].<ref name="GatORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref>

==History==
When the cluster was discovered by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Draggulch Period]], the worlds of the cluster formed a [[confederacy]] known as the [[Commonality]]. Five centuries later, the Vorzyd Cluster attracted [[Commenor/Legends|Commenorian]] investors who settled on the nearby planet [[Columex/Legends|Columex]] and began trading with the cluster. Columex joined the confederacy and, in a few generations, the aggressive Columexi traders allowed Columex to take control of the entire Commonality. The Commonality and the Vorzyd Cluster eventually joined the Republic.<ref name="GatORW" />

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the Commonality was represented by in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Jheramahd Greyshade]]. He was later succeeded in office by his cousin, [[Simon Greyshade/Legends|Simon Greyshade]].<ref name="VSV2">{{SW|url=news/viva-space-vegas-the-history-of-the-marvelous-wheel-part-2|series=Viva Space Vegas! The History of the Marvelous Wheel|text=Part 2|nolive=1}}</ref>

When the Republic [[Declaration of a New Order|fell]], Senator Simon Greyshade declared a state of emergency in the Commonality. Greyshade later agreed the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to seize a part of the Commonality [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] profits in exchange of the control of [[The Wheel/Legends|the Wheel]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], to a Columexi company controlled by Greyshade. Simon Greyshade remained senator until the [[Dissolution of the Imperial Senate/Legends|dissolution]] of the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]]. The Commonality was later ruled by a [[Moff/Legends|Moff]],<ref name="GatORW" /> [[Diedrich Greyshade]]<ref name="VSV2" />

The Commonality later refused to join the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and became independent.<ref name="GatORW" />
